ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of species (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morphological_traits" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "leaf_size_cm2" REAL /* Leaf size in square centimeters */,
  "SLA_g_cm2" REAL /* Specific leaf area in grams per square centimeter */,
  "LDMC_mg_g" REAL /* Leaf dry matter content in milligrams per gram */,
  "LAI_LA_canopy_area" REAL /* Leaf area index (leaf area per canopy area) */,
  "LAR_cm2_g" REAL /* Leaf area ratio in square centimeters per gram */,
  "seed_mass_g" REAL /* Seed mass in grams */,
  "seed_size_mm3" REAL /* Seed size in cubic millimeters */,
  "max_height_cm" REAL /* Maximum height in centimeters */,
  "SRL_m_g" REAL /* Specific root length in meters per gram */,
  "relative_spread_lateral_height" REAL /* Relative spread (lateral to height ratio) */,
  "rooting_depth_oscar" REAL /* Rooting depth in centimeters (OSCAR) */,
  "stem_diameter_cm" REAL /* Stem diameter in centimeters */,
  "leaf_thickness_mm" REAL /* Leaf thickness in millimeters */,
  "specific_leaf_density_g_cm3" REAL /* Specific leaf density in grams per cubic centimeter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenological_traits" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "phenology_doy_50_fruit" INTEGER /* Day of year when 50% of fruits are ripe */,
  "phenology_corrected_may_2016_frame_shift_error" INTEGER /* Corrected day of year for frame shift error in May 2016 */,
  "budbreak_date" TEXT /* Date of budbreak */,
  "flowering_date" TEXT /* Date of flowering */,
  "seed_production_date" TEXT /* Date of seed production */,
  "leaf_senescence_date" TEXT /* Date of leaf senescence */,
  "dormancy_date" TEXT /* Date of dormancy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_traits" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "leaf_pH" REAL /* Leaf pH */,
  "foliar_N" REAL /* Foliar nitrogen concentration */,
  "CN_ratio" REAL /* Carbon-to-nitrogen ratio */,
  "d13C" REAL /* Carbon isotope ratio (δ13C) */,
  "d15N" REAL /* Nitrogen isotope ratio (δ15N) */,
  "water_content_percent" REAL /* Water content in percent */,
  "ash_content_percent" REAL /* Ash content in percent */,
  "lignin_content_percent" REAL /* Lignin content in percent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type at the site */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Vegetation type at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species collected */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection site */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the collection event */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES collection_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the collector */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the collector */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the collector */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the species data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species used in the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication appeared */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., data, metadata) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "institution1" TEXT /* Name of the first institution */,
  "institution2" TEXT /* Name of the second institution */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date when the agreement was made */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* Type of agreement (e.g., data sharing, collaboration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)
